overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through rural farmland on an overcast day. The character approaches a wooden farm building, passes an NPC working on a fence, turns around, and walks back into the open countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through grassy fields

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward distant farm building

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the countryside
deciduous trees with green foliage lining the path
hazy mountain peaks visible on the horizon
rustic wooden building with chimney approaching in the distance
low stone wall running alongside the left side of the path
open meadows with tall grass and wildflowers

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dirt trail through open farmland with scattered trees and distant mountains visible under an overcast sky. The path leads toward a wooden farm building that gradually approaches from the center distance.

events.description: character slows and turns around 180 degrees near the farm building

agents.ego_description: approaching farm building, passing NPC working on fence, then turning to walk back

notable_agents.action: bending over repairing a wooden fence near the building

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence with horizontal beams near the farm building
old wooden cart with wheels parked beside the building

segments.scene_description: Arriving at the farm building, passing an NPC working on a wooden fence to the left. The character slows and turns around near the building, with a wooden cart and additional farm structures visible in the farmyard.

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the path

agents.ego_description: walking away from the farm back into open countryside

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera along the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Walking away from the farm back into the open countryside, passing another pedestrian walking in the opposite direction. The farm buildings recede behind as the trail continues through grassy fields toward distant tree lines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through rural farmland that leads toward a farmstead before retreating back into the open countryside. It begins by following a dirt trail through open fields with scattered trees and distant mountains visible under an overcast sky, as a wooden farm building gradually approaches from the center distance. As the camera arrives at the farm, it passes an NPC working on a wooden fence and moves through a yard containing a wooden cart and various farm structures. The character then slows and turns around, shifting the perspective away from the buildings and back toward the open landscape. Finally, the scene expands as the camera passes another pedestrian and follows the trail through grassy fields toward distant tree lines, leaving the farmstead to recede behind.
